attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT  
	RSH.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE  
	,GL.PRODUCT_KEY         
	,GL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY      
	,RSH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE    
	,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,	SUM(GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT) DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT
,	SUM(GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT) DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT
,	SUM(GL.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM) DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM
,	SUM(GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT) DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT
,	SUM(GL.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT) DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT
,	SUM(GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT) DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT
,	SUM(GL.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT) DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT
,	SUM(GL.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT) DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT
,	SUM(GL.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT) DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT
,	SUM(GL.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY) DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY
,	SUM(GL.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY) DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY
,	SUM(GL.DV_CREDIT_MEMO_AMT) DV_CREDIT_MEMO_AMT
,	SUM(GL.DV_DEBIT_MEMO_AMT) DV_DEBIT_MEMO_AMT
,	SUM(GL.DV_INV_REV_BASE_LIST_AMT) DV_INV_REV_BASE_LIST_AMT
,	SUM(GL.DV_SHIPPED_REV_AMT) DV_SHIPPED_REV_AMT
,	SUM(GL.DV_NET_ADJ_AMT) DV_NET_ADJ_AMT
,	SUM(GL.DV_REV_STANDARD_COST_AMT) DV_REV_STANDARD_COST_AMT
,	SUM(GL.DV_DIRECT_REV_ADJ_AMT) DV_DIRECT_REV_ADJ_AMT
,	SUM(GL.DV_DIRECT_COST_ADJ_AMT) DV_DIRECT_COST_ADJ_AMT
,	SUM(GL.DV_INDIRECT_REV_ADJ_AMT) DV_INDIRECT_REV_ADJ_AMT
,	SUM(GL.DV_INDIRECT_COGS_ADJ_AMT) DV_INDIRECT_COGS_ADJ_AMT
,	SUM(GL.DV_GMB_COGS_ADJ_AMT) DV_GMB_COGS_ADJ_AMT
,	SUM(GL.DV_EXCESS_OBSOLETE_ADJ_AMT) DV_EXCESS_OBSOLETE_ADJ_AMT
,	SUM(GL.DV_OVERHEAD_ADJ_AMT) DV_OVERHEAD_ADJ_AMT
,	SUM(GL.DV_VARIANCE_ADJ_AMT) DV_VARIANCE_ADJ_AMT
,	SUM(GL.DV_WARRANTY_ADJ_AMT) DV_WARRANTY_ADJ_AMT
 FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_MEASURE_ICPM GL
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_MSR_SALES_HIER RSH
ON (GL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY )
WHERE 
RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR IN ( SELECT TGT_L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ICPM_REV_FILTER_CNTL WHERE  TRIANGULATION_TYPE_ID_INT  IN( 1,2,3) ) 
AND RSH.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE IN (SELECT L3_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CD FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_REV_DISTI_SL3_SL2_MAP )
GROUP BY 
RSH.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE  
,GL.PRODUCT_KEY      
,GL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY          
,RSH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE   
,GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT

SELECT
POS_BOOKINGS.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
,MAPPING.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CD    
,POS_BOOKINGS.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE 
,POS_BOOKINGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  POS_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,SUM(POS_BOOKINGS.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT )  OVER (  PARTITION BY POS_BOOKINGS.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,MAPPING.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CD ,POS_BOOKINGS.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,POS_BOOKINGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY)  SL6_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT
,SUM(POS_BOOKINGS.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT )  OVER (  PARTITION BY  POS_BOOKINGS.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,MAPPING.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CD )  SL3_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT    
,CASE WHEN SL3_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT <>0.000000 THEN CAST(SL6_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT AS DECIMAL(27,14))/CAST(SL3_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT     AS DECIMAL(27,14)) ELSE 0.00000000000000 END POS_ALLOCATION_RATIO 
FROM 
(
SELECT   
   DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT          
   ,L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE 
  ,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
  ,SUM(DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT   ) DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT 
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_BKGS_MEASURE_ICPM  GL
 GROUP BY 
   DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
 , L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE   
  ,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
  ) POS_BOOKINGS
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_REV_DISTI_SL3_SL2_MAP MAPPING
ON ( POS_BOOKINGS.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE =MAPPING.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CD)
QUALIFY POS_ALLOCATION_RATIO <>0

SELECT   
   MTH_CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT     
,GL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,GL.PRODUCT_KEY  
, L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE 
,ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
,CASE WHEN RSH.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE='SMALL MEDIUM BUSINESS'THEN 'COMMERCIAL' ELSE RSH.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE END  SALES_COVERAGE_CODE1           
,SUM(DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT  ) DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKGS_MEASURE  GL
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_TRNGLTD_MTH_CNTL MTH_CNTL
ON(GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT BETWEEN MTH_CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_3MTH_AGO_INT AND MTH_CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_1MTH_AGO_INT )
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_MSR_SALES_HIER RSH
ON (GL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND MTH_CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=RSH.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN RP
ON RP.ITEM_KEY=GL.PRODUCT_KEY
WHERE 
BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE='POS'
AND RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE IN ('CORP. REVENUE','UNKNOWN') 
AND GL.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG = 'Y'
AND GL.SERVICE_FLG  =  'N'
 AND DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT<> 0
AND SALES_COVERAGE_CODE IN (SELECT VALID_SALES_COVERAGE_CODE FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ICPM_REV_FILTER_CNTL WHERE TRIANGULATION_TYPE_ID_INT=2)
AND  RSH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE NOT IN(SELECT ISO_COUNTRY_CODE FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ICPM_REV_FILTER_CNTL WHERE TRIANGULATION_TYPE_ID_INT=2)
AND  RP.BK_TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID NOT IN (SELECT TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ICPM_REV_FILTER_CNTL WHERE TRIANGULATION_TYPE_ID_INT=2)
GROUP BY 
   MTH_CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT     
,GL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,GL.PRODUCT_KEY  
, L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE  
,ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
,SALES_COVERAGE_CODE1
